hooks.command: file=$(python3 -c "import sys,json,os; print(json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && ruff check "$file" 2>&1 | head -10 || true
git diff --name-only HEAD -- .claude/lessons/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo '⚠️  LESSONS.md not updated this session — CLAUDE.md requires a write-back before ending.'
